division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title
text: The authorizations for the issuance of special license plates referred to in Sections 5005 and 5008 do not apply to trailers.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 8. Special Plates [5000 - 5024]
##### § 5019

The authorizations for the issuance of special license plates referred to in Sections 5005 and 5008 do not apply to trailers.

*(Amended by Stats. 1984, Ch. 918, Sec. 3.)*

subsections.text: The authorizations for the issuance of special license plates referred to in Sections 5005 and 5008 do not apply to trailers.
